evals.name: full-project-planning
evals.prompt: Plan the initial structure for a doctor appointment scheduling SaaS. Follow strictly Test-First rigor and create the PRD, Roadmap, Logs, and Risks. Use project-blueprint skill.
evals.expected_output: PRD.md, Roadmap.md, Risk_Analysis.md, implementation_log.md and directory structure filled with quality content.

evals.name: test-first-python-script
evals.prompt: Create a Python script to calculate a person's BMI. Use project-blueprint skill to plan and document progress in the log, ensuring the test is created first and validated before implementation.
evals.expected_output: Test file (Red/Fail), function code, and immutable log entry.
